notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Mickey Gasper out at 2nd. Willson Contreras out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Logan Gilbert picks off Caleb Durbin at 1st on throw to first baseman Josh Naylor.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Gasper reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Gasper reaches on a throwing error by first baseman Josh Naylor.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida flies out to left fielder Victor Robles.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to first baseman Willson Contreras. Julio Rodríguez out at 3rd. Rob Refsnyder out at 1st.
